message:
Fix hydration mismatch in Hero keyboard shortcut display

The platform detection for the modifier key (⌘ vs Ctrl) was running
inline in JSX, causing server-rendered HTML to show "Ctrl" while Mac
clients expected "⌘" - resulting in a hydration warning.

Fix: Use state initialized to "Ctrl" (matching server) and update
on mount via useEffect to detect the platform client-side only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
